site.title: Brandy Banks | Model, Founder & Host
site.description: Brandy Banks is a model and digital creator, founder of Diamonds & Smoke Ent. and Noir Sleepwear, and host of the show Under Pressure. One place for all of it.

home.sub_bold: Model, founder, and the face of my own brands.
home.sub_rest: I run Diamonds & Smoke Ent., design Noir Sleepwear, and host Under Pressure. One home for all of it, and the easiest way to book me.

modeling.title: MODELING
modeling.intro: Editorial, campaign, and brand work. I model for my own labels and collaborate with brands that match the vibe: bold, luxe, and unapologetic. Want to shoot or feature me? Reach out.

acting.title: NOIR SLEEPWEAR
acting.intro: Noir Sleepwear is my luxe sleepwear line: silk, lace, and pieces made to make you feel like the moment. Built for confidence, designed to be seen. DM me for drops and details.

gallery.alt: Noir Sleepwear silk and lace pieces
gallery.caption: SILK & LACE

content-creation.title: UNDER PRESSURE
content-creation.intro: Under Pressure is my show: real conversations, no filter. I sit down with people worth hearing and we get into it. Catch new episodes and the behind the scenes here.

gallery.alt: Under Pressure show hosted by Brandy Banks
gallery.caption: THE SHOW

gallery.alt: Behind the mic on Under Pressure
gallery.caption: BACKSTAGE

about.title: ABOUT BRANDY
paragraphs: I'm Brandy Banks. Model, mom, and the woman behind Diamonds & Smoke Ent. I never wait for permission. I build my own tables.
Between modeling, running Noir Sleepwear, and hosting Under Pressure, I'm building a brand that's all me. If you want to collaborate, book me, or feature me, my DMs are open.

guide.title: NOIR SLEEPWEAR
guide.body: My luxe sleepwear line. Silk, lace, and pieces made to be seen. Message me for drops, sizing, and details.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: Bookings, collabs, features, or press. The quickest way to reach me is a DM on Instagram. Tell me what you've got in mind.

booking.title: Let's work together
booking.intro: Bookings, collabs, features, or just to say hi. The fastest way to reach me is a DM on Instagram.
